SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CARLOS OVANDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANABEL ROMERO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FROYLAN CARBAJAL IS PRESENT. ALL THE DEFENDANTS ARE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEW, JEREMY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OVANDO, CARLOS CARBAJAL, FROYLAN ROMERO, ANABEL DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY NOTHING. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. HE DID NOT HAVE ANY NOTICE OF VIOLATION, HE COULD NOT PROVE THE DEFENDANTS LEFT ANY TRASH. THERE ARE 28 RESIDENTS RESIDING AT THE PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,064.00 FILED BY CHEW, JEREMY AS TO DEFENDANT OVANDO, CARLOS CARBAJAL, FROYLAN ROMERO, ANABEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
